corrections.current: 48 ὁ δὲ στὰς ἐν μέσῳ αὐτῶν εἶπεν
corrections.correct: ὁ δὲ στὰς ἐν μέσῳ αὐτῶν εἶπεν
corrections.note: The second '48' is a left-margin line number, not body text.

corrections.current: 49 κατεκρίνατε θυγατέρα Ἰσραήλ; 49 ἀναστρέψατε εἰς τὸ κριτήριον·
corrections.correct: κατεκρίνατε θυγατέρα Ἰσραήλ; ἀναστρέψατε εἰς τὸ κριτήριον·
corrections.note: Both '49' numerals are marginal line numbers captured into the body.

corrections.current: 60 ἔχων πρίσαι σε μέσον, ὅπως ἐξολεθρεύσῃ ὑμᾶς. 60 Καὶ ἀνεβόησεν
corrections.correct: ἔχων πρίσαι σε μέσον, ὅπως ἐξολεθρεύσῃ ὑμᾶς. Καὶ ἀνεβόησεν
corrections.note: The second '60' before Καὶ is a marginal line number, not body text.
Printed apparatus uses plain Latin abbreviations here, not superscript formatting.
There is a question mark after Qc in the image.
No line break in the printed apparatus at this point.
The final Q has superscript c in the image.
The siglum after the bracket appears to be Latin l with vid, not capital I.
No line break in the printed apparatus at this point.

notes: Running head and page number match. Main body is generally correct apart from marginal line numbers captured as verse numbers. Apparatus mostly matches; a few formatting/siglum details and line-break intrusions were corrected.
